# Scenario: Full buffer render from API message response (double-permission)
# Uses :refresh to load the /session/:id/message response and render all messages.
# Tests: user messages, assistant text, two bash tool calls (one completed, one running),
# plus a pending permission popup for the second tool.

:session ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt
:directory /Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el

# Mock the pending permission API — server returns the second permission still pending
:api GET /permission 200 [{"id":"per_cc79941b90010VFqjQG6u9o6MC","sessionID":"ses_3386b5059ffeBogREim0gJGiDt","permission":"bash","patterns":["git push"],"metadata":{},"always":["git push*"],"tool":{"messageID":"msg_cc79908f1001LhN5AIt9O72NLr","callID":"toolu_vrtx_01FfezigSd5dRjoNqmp9Vkqo"}}]

# Load the saved API response and render the full buffer
:refresh double-permission/messages.json

# --- Assertions ---

# Assistant text should be rendered
:assert-contains I detect

# Bash tool should show the command
:assert-contains git push

# Permission popup should be displayed (from /permission/ API)
:assert-contains git push
